construction.carrier: represented by a uniform effective enumeration rather than materializing a completed infinite set
construction.states: represented by indexed target state objects generated on demand
construction.transitions: represented by a uniform computable transition schema
construction.commitments: finite-support commitments at each stage are represented with their grounds and dependencies
construction.history: represented as a coherent directed family of finite prefixes
construction.recovery: every source finite prefix is recovered from its target image by one uniform decoder

reason: The construction proves faithful representation for countably infinite effectively presented systems with uniform finite-prefix semantics. It does not cover uncountable, non-effective, oracle-dependent, continuous, semantically changing, or actual-process cases.
nonclaims: all infinite-carrier reasoning systems are represented
uncountable or non-effective systems are covered
finite-prefix success alone proves completed-infinite semantics
FARA is necessary minimal or unique
